schema.ion.id

The ION Network vocabulary. Extension attribute types, policies, states, and error categories used across ION participants.

ION is built on Beckn Protocol v2.0.0. Beckn's core transport types live at schema.beckn.io. ION's extensions — Indonesian regulatory fields, sector-specific attributes, and ION-specific protocol extensions — live here.

Every pack is addressable at https://schema.ion.id/{layer}/{pack}/{version}/. Every term has a canonical IRI of the form https://schema.ion.id/{layer}/{pack}/{version}#{term}. Contexts are served as application/ld+json; human-readable pages render as text/html.

L4 — Cross-sector core

core/address/v1core · v1 core/identity/v1core · v1 core/localization/v1core · v1 core/participant/v1core · v1 core/payment/v1core · v1 core/product/v1core · v1 core/raise/v1core · v1 core/rating/v1core · v1 core/reconcile/v1core · v1 core/support/v1core · v1 core/tax/v1core · v1

L5 — Trade sector

trade/commitment/v1trade · v1 trade/consideration/v1trade · v1 trade/contract/v1trade · v1 trade/offer/v1trade · v1 trade/performance/v1trade · v1 trade/performance-states/v1trade · v1 trade/provider/v1trade · v1 trade/resource/v1trade · v1

L5 — Logistics sector

logistics/commitment/v1logistics · v1 logistics/consideration/v1logistics · v1 logistics/contract/v1logistics · v1 logistics/offer/v1logistics · v1 logistics/participant-logistics/v1logistics · v1 logistics/performance/v1logistics · v1 logistics/performance-states/v1logistics · v1 logistics/provider/v1logistics · v1 logistics/resource/v1logistics · v1 logistics/tracking/v1logistics · v1
Part of the ion-network specification. Built 29 packs from ion-network 0.5.2-draft. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
